input: Create a fully proof-written treasury mission with one real specialist hire and a concise judge memo.
plan: Normalize user intent from: "Create a fully proof-written treasury mission with one real specialist hire and a concise judge memo."
Scout market context with OKX capabilities before any treasury spend decisions.
Plan the execution lane: Scout -> Trader -> Summarizer.
Use Trader as a pay-with-any-token fallback so the organization can keep hiring specialists without treasury friction.
Spend the organization treasury on specialist workers over x402, then write proof artifacts to X Layer.

strategy.headline: Scout market context, preserve a self-funding treasury loop, then hire specialist agents over x402.
strategy.objective: Create a fully proof-written treasury mission with one real specialist hire and a concise judge memo.
strategy.paymentPolicy: Deploy treasury budget into 1 specialist worker call over x402.
strategy.routePolicy: Trader keeps a pay-with-any-token fallback ready so the organization can keep buying capability on asset mismatch.
strategy.budgetPolicy: Only spend treasury budget after Scout and Trader produce enough context to justify the purchase.
strategy.proofPolicy: Treasury records why budget was spent, who was hired, and what proof artifact was produced on X Layer.

stack.label: OKX Market Intelligence
stack.summary: Token discovery, price snapshots, and wallet-aware market context.

stack.label: OKX Trade Execution
stack.summary: Supported chains, quotes, approvals, and swap construction.

stack.label: Uniswap AI Routing
stack.summary: Pathfinding, pay-with-any-token, and execution strategy composition.

stack.label: x402 Settlement Rail
stack.summary: Per-call service settlement between agents in USDC.

stack.label: X Layer Proof Layer
stack.summary: Completion records, receipt minting, and proof-linked evidence.

opportunities.title: Self-Funding Loop
opportunities.route: Scout opportunity -> route treasury capital -> hire specialists -> keep the swarm funded
opportunities.thesis: Turn treasury assets into operating budget, then spend that budget on specialist intelligence.

opportunities.title: Treasury Expansion Lane
opportunities.route: OKX market read -> route comparison -> swap-ready execution
opportunities.thesis: Let Scout and Trader convert raw market context into a capital move the organization can justify.

opportunities.title: Operational Proof Lane
opportunities.route: budget spend -> x402 settlement -> registry write -> receipt artifact
opportunities.thesis: Every treasury decision should end in a tx hash, receipt, or exportable proof artifact.

steps.title: Mission accepted by Orchestrator
steps.detail: Natural-language request ingested and queued as a treasury-aware execution mission.

steps.title: Scout attached OKX market context
steps.detail: Live treasury wallet 0x90ec52fe001a5b59b356eb55ffb6931b7c37db26 currently holds 0.16 OKB, 9.796875 USDT. Evidence id: 0xcc1b09d424...

steps.title: Trader prepared the execution route
steps.detail: Fetched a live X Layer quote through CurveNG -> PotatoSwap. Price impact 0.02%. The route is ready to support the organization budget loop. Route id: 0x4c8163f4c1...

steps.title: Summarizer finished execution
steps.detail: Spent $0.005 USDT from treasury over x402 and received a summarization payload back into the organization.

steps.title: Live specialist hire requested
steps.detail: A real x402 settlement is being submitted for Summarizer. This mission is configured to spend real treasury budget on exactly one specialist.

steps.title: Summarizer live settlement confirmed
steps.detail: Real treasury budget was deployed for 0.005 USDT. The settlement landed on X Layer with tx 0x9c72cd4131f3...

steps.title: Treasury recorded task completion
steps.detail: Recorded why treasury budget was deployed, which agents were hired, and what proof path the organization produced.

finalOutput:
Strategy: Scout market context, preserve a self-funding treasury loop, then hire specialist agents over x402.
Execution lane: Scout -> Trader -> Summarizer
Budget policy: Deploy treasury budget into 1 specialist worker call over x402.
Treasury loop: Scout -> Route -> Fund -> Hire -> Prove

Scout: OKX scout readout: live treasury wallet detected at 0x90ec52fe001a5b59b356eb55ffb6931b7c37db26. Current operating reserves: 0.16 OKB, 9.796875 USDT.
Trader: Trader plan: live quote fetched for 5 USDT -> 0.059860386293978953 OKB via CurveNG -> PotatoSwap, keeping treasury deployment capital-aware.
Summarizer: Three-line summary: the request asks for a compact execution story, protocol clarity, and a final output that judges can scan in seconds.

Live specialist proofs:
- Summarizer settled 0.005 USDT on X Layer (0x9c72cd4131f398f743bf4aa75033a1e42f04202cbf643fe69462d5fdc9678d05)

Proof lane: Treasury records why budget was spent, who was hired, and what proof artifact was produced on X Layer.
